features: Size & Color: 20x11x24cm/5 PCS with Black/10 PCS Tissue Paper
Ingenious Design: Balancing sight and touch.Our solid color white cardboard bags offer both visual enjoyment and a comfortable experience with ribbon handles and tissue paper

Versatile & Reusable Don't let the name fool you! Our paper bags can hold gifts for family, friends, and lovers, but can also be utilized multiple times for supermarket shopping, storing items, and more. It's the perfect addition to any home or business

Safe: Our bags are made with 100% high-quality and recyclable cardboard that is non-toxic and odorless. Quality and safety are our top priorities.With our FSC certification (FSC-C221225), you knew that our paper is sourced from responsibly managed forests

Gcardist: Gcardist adheres to the principle of customer first, Conceptualizing the most innovative and unique designs, Using the highest quality materials, Attract the most tasteful people.We entrust the greatest warmth and blessings to our products, hoping that those who receive our products can experience love and care
